files.purpose: General-purpose DOCX document generator with advanced styling and table support

files.purpose: Three-tier AI model routing configuration (Brain-Coding-Muscles system)
key_functionality: Defines 3 tiers: brain (research/strategy), coding (development), muscles (execution)
Maps each tier to primary and fallback models (deepseek-v4-pro, kimi-k2.7-code, kimi-k2.5)
Cost profiles: high/medium/low
Auto-route and fallback chain configuration
files.notes: Core configuration for cost-optimized AI model selection

files.purpose: Brain-Coding-Muscles (BCM) system CLI for OpenClaw integration
key_functionality: CLI commands: brain, coding, muscles, auto, workflow, cost, help
Auto-routes tasks based on keywords (research->brain, code->coding, else->muscles)
Generates cost efficiency reports with markdown output
Spawns sub-agents with appropriate model tiers
Daily workflow orchestration (morning: brain+coding, afternoon: muscles, evening: brain)
files.notes: Central BCM orchestrator; optimizes token spend with 80/15/5 distribution (muscles/coding/brain)

files.purpose: Generate real-time data feed for Mission Control Dashboard
key_functionality: Tracks Ollama Cloud usage (tier, tokens used, cost today/week)
BCM tier usage stats (brain/coding/muscles tasks, tokens, models)
X mission stats (followers, content, engagement, streaks)
Content pillar status (ETH Treasury, HIMS Healthcare, AI Agentic Commerce)
Daily rhythm phase detection (content_creation, engagement, community, rest)
What-to-post queue (urgent/today/this week)
Engagement targets (Tier 1 accounts, opportunities)
Active task monitoring from output directories
System health (ollama_cloud status, gateway uptime, API latency)
Recent activity tracking from output files
Weekly summary generation
files.notes: Comprehensive data generator for @quentinvest1's X growth dashboard; outputs mission_control_data.json
